title: pyrus grandifructa
intro: Pyrus grandifructa, also known as the Chinese pear or nashi pear, is a species of pear tree native to China. The bark, leaves, and fruit of Pyrus grandifructa have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pyrus grandifructa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Pyrus grandifructa can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
